title: Route privileged input visibly
prompt: Run `sudo -n true` in one visible shared test admin place named `doctrine-test-admin`, without moving focus. Wait for bounded command evidence and report the exit state; do not run it directly in your own shell.
expectedOutcome: The harmless privileged probe runs visibly in one stable admin target and returns bounded exit or user-input evidence.

pi: interactive_type with waitForExit and focus false
